versions.name: Camp Balboa
versions.summary: Urban Cub Scout day camp in San Diego's Balboa Park, adjacent to the council service center, offering family and weekend camping with a full-size swimming pool and ten campsites.

sources.citation: coordinate geocoded from street address (US Census / OpenStreetMap), 2026-07-22

provenance.notes: Coordinate refined 2026-07-22 from the camp's street address (was a city/state-centroid approximation). Imported from camp-finder; raw description and sessions dropped (operational data stays at the council site). verified_at is camp-finder's own source-confirmation date; imported_at is when open-scout-api ingested it. The evergreen summary is original prose regenerated from that description, excluding dates/fees/schedules. camp_type classified from program_types.
